ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Continued To Oct-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Respondent F. J. Sarria To Petitioner R. Wambach'S Petition To Remove Trustee.
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Gerardo Sarria. Sarah Wessels for Rebecca Wambach.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to have standing to bring the petition to remove trustee. Mr. Freedman agreed that the demurrer can be sustained with leave to amend. Both counsel agreed to participate in Pro Bono Mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 4, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 10, 2012. The Parties are to return on September 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The July 9, 2012 hearing on the Petition for Removal is taken off calendar. The Court sustained the demurrer with leave to amend. An Amended Petition that addresses the standing and relief issues must be filed within 10 days (by July 9, 2012). Ms. Wessels agreed to waive notice. Mr. Freedman will prepare the order sustaining the demurrer with leave to amend.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: None.

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Continued To Jul-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
